description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a vibrant orange fabric, featuring a smooth and slightly matte finish. The sofa has a gently curved backrest and armrests that flare outward, creating a welcoming and modern silhouette. The seat and back cushions are visibly plush and integrated into the frame, providing a uniform and seamless appearance. The armrests are thick and padded, rising to nearly the same height as the backrest, enhancing comfort and support. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and sturdy look. The upholstery appears to be a soft microfiber or suede-like material, with subtle textural variations visible across the surface.
description: A modern, orange two-seater sofa with plush, integrated cushions and flared, padded armrests. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with a solid base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the continuous, solid base extending to the floor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two plush seat cushions, curved backrest, and flared armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the thick armrest and seamless base design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the gently curved backrest and the sofa's solid, uninterrupted back panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two attached back cushions, all uniform in size and seamlessly integrated into the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded armrests that flare outward and rise nearly to the height of the backrest, with a smooth, rounded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a continuous, solid plinth that extends to the floor, giving the sofa a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, gently curved backrest that is continuous and integrated with the frame, featuring attached cushions and a smooth surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid orange color with a smooth, matte texture and subtle, natural-looking variations in the fabric surface.
